subcodes.first_line: O sagacious healer, the body is weak and the frame enfeebled, contingent being is grievously ill and infinitely frail, afflicted with maladies [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حکیم حاذق تن ضعیف و جسم نحیف امکان بغایت علیل و بی نهایت نحیل و امراض و
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @Greatest Name, @Manifestation of God as divine physician, @changing and unchanging parts of religion
